choices.text: v5. Declare via //@version=5 first line. Major improvements over v4: better types (matrices, maps), error handling, more built-ins, cleaner syntax. Always use v5 for new scripts.

indicator() = visual indicators only (lines, markers, oscillators). strategy() = enables backtesting + entry/exit orders + trading simulation. Use indicator() for visualization; strategy() when you want to backtest entries/exits + see performance metrics.

questions.explanation: indicator() = visualize only; strategy() = backtest trades.
